Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: A fiscal document (NF-e) fetched from SEFAZ.

chNFe.description: The 44-digit access key of the NF-e.

valor.description: The total value of the invoice.

data.description: The date and time the invoice was issued.

status.description: The current status of the invoice (e.g., Autorizada).

xml.description: The raw XML content of the invoice.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this invoice.

createdAt.description: When this record was created in the database.

/invoices/{invoiceId}.description: Collection of invoices stored by users.
